subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-24 in Vienna
subcodes.first_line: Always hold gatherings at your home, and call to mind the things I have said. I, for my part, will pray
subcodes.first_line_orig: همیشه در خانه مجمع نمائید حرفهای مرا بیاد آرید من هم برای شما طلب تأیید مینمایم
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual transformation
